  "text": "ClickHouse Access Control and Row-Level Security Implementation Audit

ACCESS CONTROL MANAGER:
The AccessControl class (src/Access/AccessControl.h/cpp) is the central manager for the access control system. It extends MultipleAccessStorage to manage multiple nested access storages (users.xml, disk, replicated via ZooKeeper, LDAP). The AccessControl manager is responsible for:
- Managing multiple access storage implementations
- User/role resolution through getContextAccess(), getEnabledRoles(), and getEnabledRolesInfo()
- Caching mechanisms: ContextAccessCache, RoleCache, RowPolicyCache, QuotaCache, SettingsProfilesCache
- Configuration management and reload operations
- Subscription management for access entity changes through AccessChangesNotifier

USER AND ROLE RESOLUTION:
Users are defined in src/Access/User.h as an access entity containing:
- Authentication methods (AuthenticationData)
- Access rights (AccessRights)
- Granted roles (GrantedRoles)
- Default roles (RolesOrUsersSet)
- Settings profiles
- Allowed client hosts

Roles are defined in src/Access/Role.h containing:
- Access rights (AccessRights)
- Granted roles (GrantedRoles) - roles can grant other roles
- Settings profiles

Role resolution is handled by:
- RoleCache (src/Access/RoleCache.h/cpp) - caches and resolves enabled roles with expiration
- EnabledRoles (src/Access/EnabledRoles.h/cpp) - represents current roles for a session
- GrantedRoles (src/Access/GrantedRoles.h/cpp) - tracks both regular roles and roles with admin option

CONTEXTACCESS PERMISSION CHECKING:
The ContextAccess class (src/Access/ContextAccess.h/cpp) implements per-query permission checking. It:
- Checks if a specified access (read, write, admin) is granted (checkAccess methods)
- Checks grant options for permission delegation (checkGrantOption methods)
- Returns row policy filters for table access control (getRowPolicyFilter)
- Manages quota tracking (getQuota)
- Returns enabled roles and default settings
- Supports admin option checking for role delegation
ContextAccess is created via AccessControl.getContextAccess() with ContextAccessParams (src/Access/ContextAccessParams.h/cpp)

ROW-LEVEL SECURITY (ROW POLICY) IMPLEMENTATION:
Row policies are defined in src/Access/RowPolicy.h as access entities with:
- Filter expressions for different operations (SELECT, INSERT, UPDATE, DELETE)
- Permissive vs. restrictive modes
- Application to specific roles or users (RolesOrUsersSet)
- Support for database-level or table-level policies

Row policy filter generation and attachment:
- RowPolicyCache (src/Access/RowPolicyCache.h/cpp) - stores, parses, and caches row policies
- EnabledRowPolicies (src/Access/EnabledRowPolicies.h/cpp) - provides fast access to row policy filters for a user
- Filters are retrieved via ContextAccess.getRowPolicyFilter(database, table, filter_type)
- RowPolicyFilter (defined in EnabledRowPolicies.h) contains the parsed AST expression and combining logic

IACCESSSSTORAGE INTERFACE HIERARCHY:
All access entity storages implement the IAccessStorage interface (src/Access/IAccessStorage.h/cpp), which defines:
- find, read, insert, remove, update operations for access entities
- Authentication handling (authenticate method)
- Backup and restore functionality

Implementations:
1. UsersConfigAccessStorage (src/Access/UsersConfigAccessStorage.h/cpp) - reads users from users.xml configuration file (read-only)
2. DiskAccessStorage (src/Access/DiskAccessStorage.h/cpp) - persists access entities to local disk in a directory structure, supports background list writing
3. ReplicatedAccessStorage (src/Access/ReplicatedAccessStorage.h/cpp) - stores access entities in ZooKeeper for cluster-wide replication
4. MemoryAccessStorage (src/Access/MemoryAccessStorage.h/cpp) - in-memory storage for temporary or testing use
5. MultipleAccessStorage (src/Access/MultipleAccessStorage.h/cpp) - manages multiple nested storages with priority/lookup
6. LDAPAccessStorage (src/Access/LDAPAccessStorage.h/cpp) - authenticates users against external LDAP servers

ACCESS RIGHTS MANAGEMENT:
AccessRights class (src/Access/AccessRights.h/cpp) represents granted access types with:
- Grant operations at global, database, table, and column levels
- Support for grant options (WITH GRANT OPTION)
- Wildcard grants for matching multiple entities
- Revoke operations with similar granularity
- Intersection, union, and difference operations for combining rights from multiple roles

GRANT/REVOKE STATEMENT HANDLERS:
The GRANT and REVOKE SQL statements are handled through:
- InterpreterGrantQuery (src/Interpreters/Access/InterpreterGrantQuery.h/cpp) - executes GRANT/REVOKE statements and updates User/Role objects via updateUserFromQuery() and updateRoleFromQuery() methods
- InterpreterCheckGrantQuery (src/Interpreters/Access/InterpreterCheckGrantQuery.h/cpp) - implements CHECK GRANT statements to verify permissions
- InterpreterShowGrantsQuery (src/Interpreters/Access/InterpreterShowGrantsQuery.h/cpp) - displays current grants for users/roles

ADDITIONAL SUPPORTING COMPONENTS:
- AccessChangesNotifier (src/Access/AccessChangesNotifier.h/cpp) - notifies dependent caches when access entities change
- ContextAccessParams (src/Access/ContextAccessParams.h/cpp) - contains parameters for creating ContextAccess instances
- EnabledRolesInfo - stores resolved roles and their access rights
- RolesOrUsersSet - represents sets of roles or users for policy application

The architecture follows a hierarchical cache model: AccessControl -> RoleCache/RowPolicyCache/ContextAccessCache -> EnabledRoles/EnabledRowPolicies/ContextAccess, with subscription-based invalidation when entities change."
}

  "text": "ClickHouse Access Control and Row-Level Security Implementation Audit

ACCESS CONTROL MANAGER:
The AccessControl class (src/Access/AccessControl.h/cpp) is the central manager for the access control system. It extends MultipleAccessStorage to manage multiple nested access storages (users.xml, disk, replicated via ZooKeeper, LDAP). The AccessControl manager is responsible for:
- Managing multiple access storage implementations
- User/role resolution through getContextAccess(), getEnabledRoles(), and getEnabledRolesInfo()
- Caching mechanisms: ContextAccessCache, RoleCache, RowPolicyCache, QuotaCache, SettingsProfilesCache
- Configuration management and reload operations
- Subscription management for access entity changes through AccessChangesNotifier

USER AND ROLE RESOLUTION:
Users are defined in src/Access/User.h as an access entity containing:
- Authentication methods (AuthenticationData)
- Access rights (AccessRights)
- Granted roles (GrantedRoles)
- Default roles (RolesOrUsersSet)
- Settings profiles
- Allowed client hosts

Roles are defined in src/Access/Role.h containing:
- Access rights (AccessRights)
- Granted roles (GrantedRoles) - roles can grant other roles
- Settings profiles

Role resolution is handled by:
- RoleCache (src/Access/RoleCache.h/cpp) - caches and resolves enabled roles with expiration
- EnabledRoles (src/Access/EnabledRoles.h/cpp) - represents current roles for a session
- GrantedRoles (src/Access/GrantedRoles.h/cpp) - tracks both regular roles and roles with admin option

CONTEXTACCESS PERMISSION CHECKING:
The ContextAccess class (src/Access/ContextAccess.h/cpp) implements per-query permission checking. It:
- Checks if a specified access (read, write, admin) is granted (checkAccess methods)
- Checks grant options for permission delegation (checkGrantOption methods)
- Returns row policy filters for table access control (getRowPolicyFilter)
- Manages quota tracking (getQuota)
- Returns enabled roles and default settings
- Supports admin option checking for role delegation
ContextAccess is created via AccessControl.getContextAccess() with ContextAccessParams (src/Access/ContextAccessParams.h/cpp)

ROW-LEVEL SECURITY (ROW POLICY) IMPLEMENTATION:
Row policies are defined in src/Access/RowPolicy.h as access entities with:
- Filter expressions for different operations (SELECT, INSERT, UPDATE, DELETE)
- Permissive vs. restrictive modes
- Application to specific roles or users (RolesOrUsersSet)
- Support for database-level or table-level policies

Row policy filter generation and attachment:
- RowPolicyCache (src/Access/RowPolicyCache.h/cpp) - stores, parses, and caches row policies
- EnabledRowPolicies (src/Access/EnabledRowPolicies.h/cpp) - provides fast access to row policy filters for a user
- Filters are retrieved via ContextAccess.getRowPolicyFilter(database, table, filter_type)
- RowPolicyFilter (defined in EnabledRowPolicies.h) contains the parsed AST expression and combining logic

IACCESSSSTORAGE INTERFACE HIERARCHY:
All access entity storages implement the IAccessStorage interface (src/Access/IAccessStorage.h/cpp), which defines:
- find, read, insert, remove, update operations for access entities
- Authentication handling (authenticate method)
- Backup and restore functionality

Implementations:
1. UsersConfigAccessStorage (src/Access/UsersConfigAccessStorage.h/cpp) - reads users from users.xml configuration file (read-only)
2. DiskAccessStorage (src/Access/DiskAccessStorage.h/cpp) - persists access entities to local disk in a directory structure, supports background list writing
3. ReplicatedAccessStorage (src/Access/ReplicatedAccessStorage.h/cpp) - stores access entities in ZooKeeper for cluster-wide replication
4. MemoryAccessStorage (src/Access/MemoryAccessStorage.h/cpp) - in-memory storage for temporary or testing use
5. MultipleAccessStorage (src/Access/MultipleAccessStorage.h/cpp) - manages multiple nested storages with priority/lookup
6. LDAPAccessStorage (src/Access/LDAPAccessStorage.h/cpp) - authenticates users against external LDAP servers

ACCESS RIGHTS MANAGEMENT:
AccessRights class (src/Access/AccessRights.h/cpp) represents granted access types with:
- Grant operations at global, database, table, and column levels
- Support for grant options (WITH GRANT OPTION)
- Wildcard grants for matching multiple entities
- Revoke operations with similar granularity
- Intersection, union, and difference operations for combining rights from multiple roles

GRANT/REVOKE STATEMENT HANDLERS:
The GRANT and REVOKE SQL statements are handled through:
- InterpreterGrantQuery (src/Interpreters/Access/InterpreterGrantQuery.h/cpp) - executes GRANT/REVOKE statements and updates User/Role objects via updateUserFromQuery() and updateRoleFromQuery() methods
- InterpreterCheckGrantQuery (src/Interpreters/Access/InterpreterCheckGrantQuery.h/cpp) - implements CHECK GRANT statements to verify permissions
- InterpreterShowGrantsQuery (src/Interpreters/Access/InterpreterShowGrantsQuery.h/cpp) - displays current grants for users/roles

ADDITIONAL SUPPORTING COMPONENTS:
- AccessChangesNotifier (src/Access/AccessChangesNotifier.h/cpp) - notifies dependent caches when access entities change
- ContextAccessParams (src/Access/ContextAccessParams.h/cpp) - contains parameters for creating ContextAccess instances
- EnabledRolesInfo - stores resolved roles and their access rights
- RolesOrUsersSet - represents sets of roles or users for policy application

The architecture follows a hierarchical cache model: AccessControl -> RoleCache/RowPolicyCache/ContextAccessCache -> EnabledRoles/EnabledRowPolicies/ContextAccess, with subscription-based invalidation when entities change."
}

  "text": "ClickHouse Access Control and Row-Level Security Implementation Audit

ACCESS CONTROL MANAGER:
The AccessControl class (src/Access/AccessControl.h/cpp) is the central manager for the access control system. It extends MultipleAccessStorage to manage multiple nested access storages (users.xml, disk, replicated via ZooKeeper, LDAP). The AccessControl manager is responsible for:
- Managing multiple access storage implementations
- User/role resolution through getContextAccess(), getEnabledRoles(), and getEnabledRolesInfo()
- Caching mechanisms: ContextAccessCache, RoleCache, RowPolicyCache, QuotaCache, SettingsProfilesCache
- Configuration management and reload operations
- Subscription management for access entity changes through AccessChangesNotifier

USER AND ROLE RESOLUTION:
Users are defined in src/Access/User.h as an access entity containing:
- Authentication methods (AuthenticationData)
- Access rights (AccessRights)
- Granted roles (GrantedRoles)
- Default roles (RolesOrUsersSet)
- Settings profiles
- Allowed client hosts

Roles are defined in src/Access/Role.h containing:
- Access rights (AccessRights)
- Granted roles (GrantedRoles) - roles can grant other roles
- Settings profiles

Role resolution is handled by:
- RoleCache (src/Access/RoleCache.h/cpp) - caches and resolves enabled roles with expiration
- EnabledRoles (src/Access/EnabledRoles.h/cpp) - represents current roles for a session
- GrantedRoles (src/Access/GrantedRoles.h/cpp) - tracks both regular roles and roles with admin option

CONTEXTACCESS PERMISSION CHECKING:
The ContextAccess class (src/Access/ContextAccess.h/cpp) implements per-query permission checking. It:
- Checks if a specified access (read, write, admin) is granted (checkAccess methods)
- Checks grant options for permission delegation (checkGrantOption methods)
- Returns row policy filters for table access control (getRowPolicyFilter)
- Manages quota tracking (getQuota)
- Returns enabled roles and default settings
- Supports admin option checking for role delegation
ContextAccess is created via AccessControl.getContextAccess() with ContextAccessParams (src/Access/ContextAccessParams.h/cpp)

ROW-LEVEL SECURITY (ROW POLICY) IMPLEMENTATION:
Row policies are defined in src/Access/RowPolicy.h as access entities with:
- Filter expressions for different operations (SELECT, INSERT, UPDATE, DELETE)
- Permissive vs. restrictive modes
- Application to specific roles or users (RolesOrUsersSet)
- Support for database-level or table-level policies

Row policy filter generation and attachment:
- RowPolicyCache (src/Access/RowPolicyCache.h/cpp) - stores, parses, and caches row policies
- EnabledRowPolicies (src/Access/EnabledRowPolicies.h/cpp) - provides fast access to row policy filters for a user
- Filters are retrieved via ContextAccess.getRowPolicyFilter(database, table, filter_type)
- RowPolicyFilter (defined in EnabledRowPolicies.h) contains the parsed AST expression and combining logic

IACCESSSSTORAGE INTERFACE HIERARCHY:
All access entity storages implement the IAccessStorage interface (src/Access/IAccessStorage.h/cpp), which defines:
- find, read, insert, remove, update operations for access entities
- Authentication handling (authenticate method)
- Backup and restore functionality

Implementations:
1. UsersConfigAccessStorage (src/Access/UsersConfigAccessStorage.h/cpp) - reads users from users.xml configuration file (read-only)
2. DiskAccessStorage (src/Access/DiskAccessStorage.h/cpp) - persists access entities to local disk in a directory structure, supports background list writing
3. ReplicatedAccessStorage (src/Access/ReplicatedAccessStorage.h/cpp) - stores access entities in ZooKeeper for cluster-wide replication
4. MemoryAccessStorage (src/Access/MemoryAccessStorage.h/cpp) - in-memory storage for temporary or testing use
5. MultipleAccessStorage (src/Access/MultipleAccessStorage.h/cpp) - manages multiple nested storages with priority/lookup
6. LDAPAccessStorage (src/Access/LDAPAccessStorage.h/cpp) - authenticates users against external LDAP servers

ACCESS RIGHTS MANAGEMENT:
AccessRights class (src/Access/AccessRights.h/cpp) represents granted access types with:
- Grant operations at global, database, table, and column levels
- Support for grant options (WITH GRANT OPTION)
- Wildcard grants for matching multiple entities
- Revoke operations with similar granularity
- Intersection, union, and difference operations for combining rights from multiple roles

GRANT/REVOKE STATEMENT HANDLERS:
The GRANT and REVOKE SQL statements are handled through:
- InterpreterGrantQuery (src/Interpreters/Access/InterpreterGrantQuery.h/cpp) - executes GRANT/REVOKE statements and updates User/Role objects via updateUserFromQuery() and updateRoleFromQuery() methods
- InterpreterCheckGrantQuery (src/Interpreters/Access/InterpreterCheckGrantQuery.h/cpp) - implements CHECK GRANT statements to verify permissions
- InterpreterShowGrantsQuery (src/Interpreters/Access/InterpreterShowGrantsQuery.h/cpp) - displays current grants for users/roles

ADDITIONAL SUPPORTING COMPONENTS:
- AccessChangesNotifier (src/Access/AccessChangesNotifier.h/cpp) - notifies dependent caches when access entities change
- ContextAccessParams (src/Access/ContextAccessParams.h/cpp) - contains parameters for creating ContextAccess instances
- EnabledRolesInfo - stores resolved roles and their access rights
- RolesOrUsersSet - represents sets of roles or users for policy application

The architecture follows a hierarchical cache model: AccessControl -> RoleCache/RowPolicyCache/ContextAccessCache -> EnabledRoles/EnabledRowPolicies/ContextAccess, with subscription-based invalidation when entities change."
}
